name: Qdrant Vector Database
description: High-performance vector search engine for embeddings, semantic search and RAG pipelines. Ships with a built-in web dashboard and both REST and gRPC APIs. Pair it with the Ollama recipe for a fully local AI stack.

aws.service: Amazon OpenSearch Serverless (vector) or Aurora pgvector
aws.parity: Build and query vector collections locally exactly as you will against a managed vector store in production.
aws.deploy: Recreate the collection on an OpenSearch Serverless vector index (or Aurora pgvector) and repoint the client.

variables.label: REST / Dashboard Port
variables.description: Host port for the REST API and the web dashboard.

variables.label: gRPC Port
variables.description: Host port for the high-throughput gRPC API.

variables.label: API Key
variables.description: API key required in the api-key header to access the cluster.
